settings.heading: FIT BEFORE CHECKOUT
settings.body: VIRE pieces are generally relaxed. Use the measurements in each product description as the final reference before choosing your size.
settings.card_1_text: Measure flat across the chest, then compare with a piece you own.
settings.card_2_text: Check shoulder-to-hem length for how cropped or long the piece feels.
settings.card_3_text: Check waist, rise, thigh, and inseam before ordering.
